tasks.title: Rename path aliases in tsconfig.base.json to package.json format
tasks.description: We need to convert multi-slash path aliases (@codelab/xxx/yyy/zzz) to package.json compatible format (@codelab/xxx-yyy-zzz) throughout the project

subtasks.title: Create migration script to update tsconfig.base.json
subtasks.description: Create a script that will convert the paths in tsconfig.base.json from multi-slash format to hyphenated format

subtasks.title: Implement search and replace for imports throughout the codebase
subtasks.description: Update the migration script to also find and replace all import statements that use the old path aliases

subtasks.title: Run migration script in dry-run mode
subtasks.description: Execute the script with --dry-run flag to preview the changes without applying them

subtasks.title: Run migration script to apply changes
subtasks.description: Run the script without the dry-run flag to apply the changes to the codebase

subtasks.title: Update package.json dependencies if needed
subtasks.description: Check if any dependencies in package.json reference the old path aliases and update them

subtasks.title: Test the project after migration
subtasks.description: Ensure the project builds and runs correctly after the path alias changes
